programme.sub-title: Gordon Ramsay Savagely Critiques Spicy Wings

In this episode, David Corenswet gets his first ever taste of a Greggs sausage roll, while Nicholas Hoult tries to convince him that British chocolate deserves more respect, and the two debate which country's fake cheese is more questionable.

programme.title: Snack Wars
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay, Paul Ainsworth and Nyesha Arrington film a special 'Chef's Edition' of Snack Wars: England Vs USA. Gordon Ramsay throws a Pop-Tart, he judges beans on toast and they all have incredible reactions to Toxic Waste!

programme.title: Snack Wars
programme.desc: The hilarious Stephen Graham decides which region of the UK has the better snacks... North or South? He has a great time sampling the likes of saveloy, gingerbread and jellied eels and sparks the age-old debate about the pronunciation of 'scone'. Singer and songwriter Burna Boy tries some of Britain's most iconic meals in Snack Wars, comparing them to foods from his birthplace of Nigeria. He tackles cauliflower cheese, recalls the time Pot Noodle 'saved his life' and drinks a lot of Pimm's.

programme.title: Agree to Disagree

programme.title: Minutes With

programme.title: Minutes With

programme.title: Dhadak
programme.desc: Dhadak is a heartfelt romantic drama that follows Madhukar and Parthavi, two young lovers from different social backgrounds who feel an instant, deep connection. As their love grows, they face fierce opposition from their families and society, which disapproves of their relationship due to class and caste differences. Despite the challenges, the couple elopes, hoping to build a life together away from prejudice and control. However, their journey is fraught with emotional and societal struggles. Dhadak portrays the innocence, intensity, and pain of first love, emphasizing the harsh realities that often confront youthful passion in a deeply divided society.

programme.title: Conspiracy Files Unsealed
programme.desc: Conspiracy Files looks at how some world leaders throughout history have used impostors and doubles. programme.title: Cheetah Diaries
programme.desc: Emily's future ambassador cubs are put to the test to see if they can handle the responsibility of working with the public. We learn more about how people are using dogs to protect their farm stock without hurting the cheetah population. The Cheetah Outreach Center prepares to move to a bigger, better location.

programme.title: Cheetah Diaries
programme.desc: There is some big-move drama as the race against time begins. The team has so much to do and not a lot of time to do it. The cubs are moving out to meet some older cheetahs, and Chobi goes in for some dental work.

programme.title: Wild and Alive
programme.desc: Five critically endangered African species find protection in one modest haven - De Hoop Nature reserve is not only a World heritage Site its's also incredibly important for the survival of these iconic animal.

programme.title: Wild and Alive
programme.desc: On the coast of south Africa, a group of mammoth mammals is arriving from the deep ocean.

programme.title: Lion
programme.desc: The endless plains of East Africa is a paradise for lions. The most social of all cats, lions form prides that are unlike any other animals. Together, they'll hunt, raise their young and defend their territory. With such a close family and plentiful home, the pride welcomes new babies every year. But new children introduces new dangers. The cubs will have to trust their instincts, their mother and the power of the pride if they are to make it to adulthood and take their place on the African plains.

programme.title: Bucketlist Africa
programme.desc: Africa: one of the most iconic and diverse continents. It's packed with a spectacular range of habitats and environments, and home to some of the best loved and dramatic wildlife on the planet. From the small and surprising to the enormous and entertaining, there's something for everyone's bucket list on this vast continent. From camels to giraffes, gorillas to buffalo, the sheer range of wildlife found in Africa is unbelievable. With so much to see, where would you begin your bucket list adventure?

programme.title: Cheetah Diaries
programme.desc: Emily's future ambassador cubs are put to the test to see if they can handle the responsibility of working with the public. We learn more about how people are using dogs to protect their farm stock without hurting the cheetah population. The Cheetah Outreach Center prepares to move to a bigger, better location.

programme.title: Cheetah Diaries
programme.desc: There is some big-move drama as the race against time begins. The team has so much to do and not a lot of time to do it. The cubs are moving out to meet some older cheetahs, and Chobi goes in for some dental work.

programme.title: Wild and Alive
programme.desc: Five critically endangered African species find protection in one modest haven - De Hoop Nature reserve is not only a World heritage Site its's also incredibly important for the survival of these iconic animal.

programme.title: Close up with Hippos
programme.desc: This nature documentary shows the many different sides of the Hippo's lives on one September day in two iconic African locations: the Masai Mara-Nationalpark in Kenya, also the setting for the largest annual animal migration on the planet – one and a half million wildebeests and zebras migrate from the Serengeti to Kenya during this time.

programme.title: The Incredible Five
programme.desc: Cheetahs are the high-speed hunters of the Savannah. Few attempt to take on larger prey than gazelles or smallish antelopes. But on occasion, the predatory cats reveal their surprisingly different side. In the Northern Serengeti, a group of male cheetahs emerges and turns all we know about them upside down. Males are usually loners or live in small groups, but here we have five tomcats hunting together as one. It is actually, the largest alliance of the animals ever seen! This film has many stories to tell about the sleek hunters.

programme.title: Hoanib
programme.sub-title: The Secret of the Desert Elephants
programme.desc: The Namib, one of the most hostile deserts on Earth. Without a firm survival strategy, no living soul will make it here. Yet, surprisingly, some species have adapted their lifestyles to these extreme conditions: chameleons, beetles, snakes and mammals are all at home here. The film follows a family of desert elephants that has also adapted to this habitat.

programme.title: Elephants: Back to the Wild
programme.desc: We follow the rescue of a baby elephant. Once rescued, it will be transported by plane to the breeding station and raised with love and commitment. In order to satisfy the little pachyderm's urge to move while in the breeding station, there is sometimes an adorable football match between the animals.

programme.title: Elephants: Back to the Wild
programme.desc: We accompany the first steps of a two-year-old elephant who is just starting his release program. We also observe the story of two young elephants in their first night in the wilderness on their own. Captivating film footage allows us to truly learn how elephants behave in the wild.

programme.title: The Beavers are back
programme.desc: The return of the beavers is one of the greatest success stories of nature conservation in Germany. Hunted for a long time and almost exterminated, today more than 35.000 beavers live in Germany again – and the trend is rising. But how did this happen? One gets to see the mostly nocturnal animals only rarely. Klaus Weißmann has spent more than two years tracking down the shy beavers and documenting their spread in Germany. Which ways do they use? What dangers are they exposed to? Step by step, this film tells the exciting and sometimes odd success story of the likeable rodents.

programme.title: Alpine Whistleblowers
programme.sub-title: On the Playground of the Marmots
programme.desc: These peculiar and roughly rabbit-sized rodents enjoy great popularity at the Großglockner in the Austrian Alps. Before the last ice age, marmots used to live in the lowland of Tirol, but with the melting of the glaciers they were driven higher up into the mountains – a trend that will continue given the current climate change. Today, they simply feel too warm below 800 meters. In spring, as soon as the temperatures begin to rise, marmots leave their dens after a nearly six-month long hibernation. After eating their share and recovering from the long fast, losing up to a third of their body weight, the most important thing is founding a family. And that sometimes involves rather fierce territorial conflicts amongst the males. As long as there is snow covering the meadows, the marmots run a high risk being out – golden eagles are looking for prey. But the marmots have an efficient warning system set up: while the group is feeding, several sentinels are located around the meadow, warning the others by shrill whistling. At the start of summer, the young ones will appear and need to be extra careful.

programme.desc: The moon disappears behind the horizon and the stage is set for a new day in the Alps of Berchtesgaden.

programme.title: Tales of Hansik EP5
programme.desc: For thousands of years, Korean cuisine has centered on a table of rice and side dishes made of grains and vegetables. Arirang TV's "Tales of Hansik" introduces the secrets of Korean cuisine, now attracting global attention as healthy slow food.

programme.title: Tales of Hansik EP4
programme.desc: In the "Juk" episode of Tales of Hansik, we learn about juk, or Korean-style porridge, the first food to be made from grains in Korea. We discover their types, their history, the benefits of juk, and the ways in which juk is served.

programme.title: Tales of Hansik EP6
programme.desc: When Koreans are preparing for a big event or have just completed the feat, they replenish their energy with meat. The most popular types of meat are beef, pork, and chicken, and each has a special place in the Korean cuisine. Beef has always been considered a precious food. Cattle symbolized strength and endurance, and in agricultural societies, they were the most important asset of a family.

programme.title: Inside Pass
programme.desc: Versatile Playmaker Stephen Perofeta gives his take on a 2017 match where his side, Taranaki, were challening for the Ranfurly Shield against Canterbury. Young Centre Alex Nankivell reveals one of his favourite moments from the 2019 NPC final, the first championship that Tasman Mako has won. Introduced as "The Golden Boy", nobody could have expected Jeff Wilson's amazing Test debut in Scotland. It would only be a prelude to an exhilarating career full of many memorable moments. The third All Black to reach 100 Tests, Keven Mealamu reminisces on his 16-year career, which took him from Eden Park all the way to his homeland of Samoa. A standout since his junior years, Victor Vito would become one of a select few dual Rugby World Cup winning players. The Blindside Flanker reveals some of his favourite moments including the Hurricanes 2016 Super Rugby triumph. All Blacks Captain Sam Cane is a stalwart of current New Zealand Rugby. The loose forward takes a look back at some of the greatest moments and wins of his career.

programme.desc: We bring you 50 minutes of Strongman inside. Fears, inspiration, courage, the best and worst from our finalists and their expectation of the finals. programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: The first part of the Strongman Champions League 2018 finals in Mexico. The last twelve athletes all pushing their boundaries and testing their limits to take the World title.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: After 11 months and 14 competitions all over the world, it all comes down to the final in this episode. The strongmen must show their best skills and every mistake is expensive, so their concentration must be at the highest possible level. Will Krzysztof manage to take off back or will Dainis maintain his lead?

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: This year 14 athletes from all over the world came to Fefor to compete in 6 cruel events. programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: The next stop in strongest league of the world is muscle capital, largest number of strong shoulders per capita in the World and of course, the most powerful host in Strongman champions league on the planet. programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: On a spectacular beach in Alanya, the MLO Strongman Champions League Turkey was viewed by thousands of spectators over a two day battle. With 12 athletes at the start over 6 cruel events, like Marble Stone Lift, Truckpull and Deadlift cars. And with the comeback of Travis Ortmayer / USA, former stone king and world ranked competitor. Winner of several SCL stages in the past.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: Four times Strongest Man of Holland, Alex Moonen and the “Flying Dutchman” Kelvin de Ruiter competing here in Holland against 12 other strongest men in the world. programme.desc: The kids want to get a trunk up into the treehouse and go to the Machine-a-Ma-Zoo, where they're introduced to simple machines. Then, Sally loses her "slidiness"!

programme.title: The Cat in the Hat Knows a Lot About That!
programme.desc: Nick and Sally are having a sleepover in the treehouse and Nick is startled by a shadow. Then, Nick unintentionally loses Sally's bouncy ball.

programme.title: The Cat in the Hat Knows a Lot About That!
programme.desc: Nick and Sally need a strong piece of string to pull their train but it breaks and they don't have anything stronger. Later, they notice a bird flying back and forth into the tree branches.

programme.title: The Cat in the Hat Knows a Lot About That!
programme.desc: The Cat takes Nick and Sally to the Magnetic Fields where they learn how magnets work. Later, Nick tries to learn how to ride his bike.

programme.title: The Cat in the Hat Knows a Lot About That!
programme.desc: Sally wants to fly her kite but can't seem to work out the timing to get the wind right. Later, Cat takes Nick and Sally to Gravity Drop.

programme.title: The Cat in the Hat Knows a Lot About That!
programme.desc: The Cat takes Nick and Sally on a journey but has to make an emergency landing on Lagoona-Maroon. Later, Nick and Sally go to a water park and learn that water always seeks the lowest level.

programme.title: The Cat in the Hat Knows a Lot About That!
programme.desc: Sally is trying to make a vase for her mother but each one she tries falls over. Later, the Cat takes Nick and Sally to Arcade Island where they discover what will and won't be attracted to a magnet.

programme.title: The Cat in the Hat Knows a Lot About That!
programme.desc: The Cat takes Sally and Nick to Machine-a-Ma-Zoo where they learn how a lever can solve their problem. Then, in Gongolia, they find out that bigger things make lower sounds.

programme.title: The Cat in the Hat Knows a Lot About That!
programme.desc: Sally keeps getting found when they play Hide and Seek. Cat takes them to Tagaloo to meet a great seeker. Then, Cat takes them to the Hole-Lot-of Funhouse.

programme.title: The Cat in the Hat Knows a Lot About That!
programme.desc: When Nick's magic trick causes his toy car to disappear under the porch, the Cat takes them to Arcade Island to win a Grasper-ma-clasper. Then, Cat takes them to Coldsnap Island.

programme.title: The Cat in the Hat Knows a Lot About That!
programme.desc: Nick and Sally can't agree on the "right" way to sort their toys. The Cat takes them to Toborrowland. Then, the kids are making bubbles and want to save one for Sally's mum but they always pop!

programme.title: The Cat in the Hat Knows a Lot About That!
programme.desc: When Nick's water glass suddenly falls over without anyone touching it, Cat comes to help them solve the mystery. Then, Cat takes them to the Jingly Jungle for a concert by the great Vibrato.

programme.title: The Cat in the Hat Knows a Lot About That!
programme.desc: Nick and Sally's soccer game is obstructed by a large log that they can't lift out of the way. Then, Nick's new plane is flying well but is a little dull so the kids add buttons and glitter.

programme.title: The Cat in the Hat Knows a Lot About That!
programme.desc: Cat shrinka-ma-doodles them so they're small enough to be in the train set. Then, Cat takes Sally and Nick to a place where they can get more sticks.

programme.title: The Jade Princess
programme.desc: In the wake of an assassination attempt targeting the royal family, the ninja invite the royal princess, HARUMI, into their makeshift family. Lloyd glimpses someone escaping over the rooftops with a sack on their back. Fearing it is the kidnapped princess, Lloyd takes up the chase! He discovers to his surprise, however, that the masked intruder is none other than the princess herself, who is not quite as docile or meek as she pretends. She has a habit of sneaking out of her chambers at night to feed the homeless who surround the Imperial Palace. This revelation only endears her to Lloyd more and Harumi and Lloyd quickly strike up a friendship. Unfortunately, trouble catches up to the ninja when the Sons Of Garmadon target the second Oni mask and attack the palace. The scope of the attack proves more than the Ninja were prepared for as the Sons of Garmadon detonate a series of subterranean bombs, bringing down part of the palace. Lloyd and Harumi escape onto the flying ship, DESTINY'S BOUNTY. But the victory is a pyrrhic one. The second Oni Mask has been stolen and Harumi's parents and Master Hutchins are feared lost.

programme.title: The Pranks
programme.desc: Stephanie finds the perfect front page story for the school paper! It's almost too good to be true. Emma and Andrea go undercover to solve the mystery of the two Jacobs.The friends are using their talents to pull a prank on Olivia. But who gets the last laugh?

programme.title: New Girl in Town
programme.desc: When the World Petacular comes to Heartlake City and is almost ruined before it's even started, five feisty girls unite, despite their differences, using their creativity to save the day. Best friends Olivia, Andrea, Emma, Mia and Stephanie reside in HeartLake City but didn't know each other - that is until the World Petacular brought them together! On the eve of the biggest event Heartlake City hosts, disaster and chaos is abound. New-in-town Olivia is helping her veterinarian Aunt Sophie with her mobile clinic. But when she's put in charge of training a scruffy puppy named Scarlet, the puppy runs amuck, leaving a trail of destruction as she collides with Andrea, ruins Emma's banner and Stephanie's cakes, and finally spooks Mia's horse Bella who bucks Mia off and sprints away. The girls quickly unite, helping each-other to save the day and most importantly have fun along the way!

programme.title: Stephanie's Surprise Party
programme.desc: When Emma, Olivia, Andrea and Mia plan a surprise party for Stephanie's birthday, they soon discover that it's not easy keeping their plans secret from Stephanie who becomes suspicious when none of the girls have time to hang out. When Emma, Olivia, Andrea and Mia plan a surprise party for Stephanie's birthday, they discover that it's not easy keeping their plans a secret. As the girls choreograph a dance routine, magic show and search for the perfect present and cake, Stephanie becomes aware that her friends are avoiding her on her birthday and excluding her from their activities... Little does she know that her friends are secretly preparing a surprise pool party for her! Once the surprise is revealed Stephanie realises how much her friends care about her and the importance of friendship.

programme.title: Dolphin Cruise
programme.desc: Olivia, Stephanie, Andrea, Mia and Emma enter a science contest at school and win a trip on a luxury yacht but not everything goes as planned when they set out to sea. When Olivia, Stephanie, Andrea, Mia and Emma enter a school science contest and win a Dolphin sight-seeing trip, not everything goes to plan...As the girls set out to sea on a luxury yacht, misunderstandings and disagreements occur which become secondary when they discover a pod of dolphins in danger. The girls learn that they have to compromise and trust in each other if they are to save the dolphins and their trip out to sea...

programme.title: Rise Of The Snakes
programme.desc: The four Ninja are snapped out of their post-hero complacency when Lord Garmadon's young son Lloyd shows up and tries to pick up where his father left off. The Ninja dismiss him as a threat, but regret that choice after Lloyd wakes up the evil snake tribe. A prophecy is revealed that states a green ninja will ultimately defeat Lord Garmadon.

programme.title: Home
programme.desc: Back in training mode with the looming threat of Lloyd and the Hypnobrai, Zane wanders after a Falcon and lands himself in a heap of trouble. The rest of the Ninja leave the training dojo to help him and return to find that the snakes have burned it to the ground.

programme.title: Snakebit
programme.desc: Lloyd, having been kicked out of the Hynobrai snake tribe unlocks a second tribe – The Fangpyres – to help him regain control. The Ninja are busy setting up their new HQ that Zane discovered, but are called to duty when the Fangpyres attack the village where Jay's family lives.

programme.title: Never Trust A Snake
programme.desc: After the Fangpyres join forces with the Hypnobrai, Lloyd awakens Pythor – the last remaining snake of the Anacondrai tribe. Pythor lures Lloyd under his spell and steals a map from him that will show him where the remaining two snakes tribes dwell and Uncle Sensei saves Lloyd from doom.

programme.title: Country Girls
programme.desc: When the girls go to Mia's grandparents' ranch and Olivia accidentally knocks down the neighbor's barn, the girls promise to raise money to rebuild it and now have to learn to set aside their differences and work together to make good on their promise. Mia invites her friends to her grandparents' ranch for the weekend. But when Olivia accidentally knocks down a neighbor's barn with a tractor, the girls promise to raise the money to rebuild it themselves. Complicating matters, Mia and Stephanie turn out to like the same boy, Martin. They'll have to learn to set aside their differences and work together if they're going to raise enough money to make good on their promise.

programme.title: Emma's Dilemma
programme.desc: When Stephanie becomes obsessed with beating her rival Tanya in a float building contest and accidentally disregards Emma's ideas and design, Tanya convinces Emma to join her team to get revenge on Stephanie. When the girls enter a float-building contest, Emma is especially excited to share her design idea for the float. But no one is listening to her, especially Stephanie, who's become obsessed with beating her rival Tanya in the contest. Emma finally does find someone who appreciates her design… Tanya! Tanya convinces Emma to join her team to build the float design. But is Tanya just using Emma to get revenge on Stephanie?

programme.title: Friends of The Jungle
programme.desc: When Olivia's Aunt Sophie is getting married and the groom has gone missing in the jungle, the girls fly out to the jungle in secret to try to find him in time for the wedding. The girls are super excited to be planning a wedding for Olivia's Aunt Sophie. There's just one little problem: Olivia learns that the groom has gone missing in the jungle while working at an animal rescue station! Not wanting to worry her aunt, Olivia, Stephanie and Mia secretly fly to the jungle to try and find the groom, Henry, rescuing a few animals along the way. Too bad Emma and Andrea couldn't keep the secret back in Heartlake City. Now, Sophie, Emma and Andrea join the others in the jungle to try and find Henry before the rapidly approaching wedding date!

programme.title: Can Of Worms
programme.desc: Lloyd moves in and tries to make nice by helping out with chores, but he just gets in the way. Pythor has awoken the Vipoids and the Constrictaurs and an all out snake war has taken over Ninjago. The Ninja are not faring well, when a mysterious Samurai shows up and saves the day.

programme.title: Darkness Shall Rise
programme.desc: Just as the rebuilding effort in Ninjago begins, the four ninjas come to realize that evil has started to resurface with Lord Garmadon forging the ninjas' lost Golden Weapons into a Mega-Weapon with unspeakable powers.With the Devourer destroyed, Ninjago is saved and the rebuilding effort begins. Without their Golden Weapons, the Ninja are stripped of their elemental powers. And with their flying ship ‘The Destiny's Bounty' destroyed, the Ninja are forced to find a new home in the city. Meanwhile, Lord Garmadon resurfaces and gains control of the Serpentine as well as transforms the Bounty's wreckage to become ‘The Black Bounty'. The Ninja will battle Scales and discover evil has begun to resurface in Ninjago, while Lord Garmadon will successfully forge the Golden Weapons into a Mega-Weapon with unspeakable powers.

programme.title: Pirates Vs. Ninja
programme.desc: When Garmadon by accident brings to life the original owners of the Black Bounty – the ruthless Captain Soto and his Pirates - it is up to our ninjas to stop them from plundering Ninjago City. Sharing a tiny, one-bedroom apartment in the city, the Ninja take Lloyd to Grand Sensei Darreth's Mojo Dojo to begin training. There, they discover Lloyd has all four of their natural elemental abilities. Meanwhile, Lord Garmadon discovers his Mega-Weapon can't destroy, only create what the user wishes. By accident, Garmadon brings to life the original owners of the Black Bounty: Captain Soto and his Pirates, and they mutiny the ship. Answering the age-old question of who would win a fight between pirates and ninja, it's up to our ninja to stop Captain Soto and his men from plundering Ninjago City. In the end, Ninjago City is saved, the Pirates are arrested and Lord Garmadon escapes once again with their Black Bounty.

programme.title: Double Trouble
programme.desc: When our heroes are invited back to Darkly's Boarding School, they discover it's a trap set up by Lord Garmadon and his evil replica ninjas created by Garmadon's new Mega-Weapo. Realizing how to correctly wield the Mega-Weapon, Lord Garmadon creates evil replicas of the Ninja to face off with our heroes. Meanwhile, Lloyd and the Ninja are invited back the Darkly's Boarding School, only to discover it's a trap and now the bad kids have seized control of the school. With the Ninja trapped in the school with the faculty, things spiral out of control as the Evil Replica Ninja arrive. As an awesome battle takes place in the school halls, the Ninja manage to outsmart their evil versions, and warn Lord Garmadon they're ready for whatever else he throws at them.

programme.title: Fright Knight
programme.desc: Using the Book of Fear, Jestro calls forth Whipperella and uses her to trap the knights in the dark woods where they realize their darkest fears. Searching through the dark forests of the realm, Jestro finds “The Book of Fear.” It's pretty scary. But he feeds it to the book of Book of Monsters, and he uses it to call forth WHIPPERELLA, a monster that can induce fear. One-by-one she uses her “knighmarish” power on the knights and they experiences their own worst fears. Clay fears not living up to the Knights' Code. Lance fears being a nobody. Macy fears never being a knight and Axl fears having no food. Aaron must take the lead because he's fearless he does everything with reckless abandon. It's not until he leads the group out of the forest – as they fight off the Whipperella – that they we find out Aaron's true fear – the fear of peace and quiet and no more challenges or high energy escapades.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: The purpose and meaning behind the endless war is revealed.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Bulkhead holds synthetic Energon formula Decepticons close in.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Ratchet's experiment with synthetic Energon turns him into a threat to all.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: A prophecy wounds a hero and triggers a long-awaited Optimus-Megatron battle.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Dark Energon eruptions alert Autobots to a deeper threat within Earth.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.sub-title: The Key to Vector Sigma, Part 1
programme.desc: Megatron creates a powerful strike team, but his Stunticons lack sentience and independent thought.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.sub-title: The Key to Vector Sigma, Part 2
programme.desc: The Autobots create the Aerialbots to join in the battle against Megatron.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Robots are truly in disguise when the Autobots pose as Stunticons to uncover Megatron's latest plan.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: The Autobots participate in a charity road race to watch over an experimental race car.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: The Aerialbots are thrown back in time to Cybertron's Golden Age.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Megatron becomes infected with cosmic rust, a metal-consuming plague.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Megatron creates a tiny but deadly electromagnetic life-form.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: After a failed attempt on Megatron's life, Starscream is banished to a deserted island.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: The Autobots experience their first Christmas, where a toy resembling Soundwave creates trouble.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: With the Autobots out of action, Sari assembles substitutes to take on Soundwave.

programme.title: The Whole Smurf And Nothing But The Smurf
programme.desc: The evil wizard Gargamel is able to capture the Smurfette. Now he is going to give her a truth serum and know all of Papa Smurf' secrets… But then Gargamel makes a big mistake and gives the Smurfette a fib formula!

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - The Secret Of Shadow Swamp: Grouchy, the Smurf who hates everything, doubly hates his own birthday party and goes to hide in Shadow Swamp... He is going to meet strange beings and stranger adventures while the other Smurfs search for him...

programme.title: Smurfiplication
programme.desc: The evil wizard Gargamel creates a magic formula that duplicates everything it touches. And surprise! Suddenly there are six Brainy Smurf! This creates a few interesting situations in the Village... And also at Gargamel's!

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - The Traveller: A dragon terrorizes the Village of the Smurfs. To put the dragon to rest, the Smurfs must find the noted Chinese traveler. Fortunately, Papa Smurf is able to understand the strange customs of the stranger, and even to speak a few words.

programme.title: The Man In The Moon
programme.desc: Sick and tired of not being appreciated, the Man in the Moon quits his job and retires on Earth, to the Village of the Smurfs. The absence of a First Quarter Moon wreaks havoc in the customs of the Smurfs, and Mother Nature and Father Time get dragged in...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - A Pet For Baby Smurf: There is a prize for the cutest pet of a Smurf. Baby Smurf brings a cute, lovely, affectionate Glowing Darling, a pet anybody falls in love with… But this pet is a creation of Gargamel, the evil wizard intent on destroying the Smurfs!

programme.title: Symbols Of Wisdom
programme.desc: Brainy Smurf desperately wants to be more like Papa Smurf. Can a hair tonic be the answer? Can Gargamel be able to finally capture the Smurfs? Does wisdom really reside in a beard?

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - The Gingerbread Smurfs: Brainy feels up to the occasion when he starts the recipe for cookies. He is sure to win the contest: he borrowed a recipe from Papa Smurf's Book of Magic. But a big surprise, and some nasty happenings, await poor Brainy... and the whole Village.

programme.title: Secret Of The Village Well
programme.desc: Why is Clumsy Smurf waiting day and night near the Village well? What is the wish that he wants to be kept secret? How is Gargamel going to be mixed up in this mysterious affair? Is Gargamel going to catch the Smurfs at last?

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - The Float Full Of Smurfs: The Smurfs must find a bunny family to pull their float in the Autumn Carnival. Gargamel sees his chance to capture the little blue people and disguises himself as a giant bunny. Is he going to catch all the Smurfs in one fell swoop?

programme.title: Stop And Smurf The Roses
programme.desc: Wicked Chlorhydris, the sorceress, wants to destroy all love and beauty on Earth. She has to annihilate Wood Elf Grove, where the loving mute elf Laconia cares for the wild flowers. But the Smurfs are there to save the day.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Jokey's Funny Bone: Jealous of the attention Vanity Smurf receives when he breaks his toe, Jokey Smurf feigns sickness in hopes of getting recognition. Unfortunately, his ploy turns against him and instead of loving care all he receives is the proverbial pound of curse.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - A Loss Of Smurfs: When the emergency call rings, all the Smurfs in the Village drop what they are doing and run to hear the news. But when Vanity Smurf calls for an assembly so that the Smurfs can admire his new hat, it is too much. They send him on his way out of the village, and Vanity has the bad luck of meeting Lofty, the Elf, who suggests a horrible mud bath...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - The Prince And The Hopper: What is that strange talking frog that Morlock the Wizard sends all of Prince Theodore's soldiers to catch? Is it a demon frog, as he says, or something else? Truth will out when Smurfette and the Smurflings meet the frog. They help to change this frog back into Prince Theodore himself, for he's been the victim of a spell cast by Morlock.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Lost Smurf: Every 500 years, Castle Captor appears and abducts innocent travelers. Grandpa takes off in his balloon for the castle, where he meets Nanny Smurf, who's been missing for 500 years. They have only a short time to escape, or they'll become permanent guests!

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Land Of The Lost And Found: Hefty, Handy, and Brainy lose Papa's telescope and Scour, the Lord of Lost and Found, finds it. The Smurfs say they'll trade anything to get it back, so Scour takes their most valuable possessions – handiness, heftiness and braininess. They journey to his domain to retrieve what was lost.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Archives Of Evil: The evil warlock Nemesis shows up at the Wizards' Library to steal the knowledge from the Archives of Evil and so get the Long Life Stone. But it's Brainy who inadvertently saves the day when he switches Greedy's cookbook and Papa's spell book.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - A House For Nanny: Roommates Smurfette and Nanny are getting on each other's nerves, so the time has come for Nanny to have a house of her own. As Nanny and Smurfette trek off to find a house-warming plant, the others design the Smurfliest house for her.

programme.title: Smurfing For Ghosts
programme.desc: Peewit is at the castle of his friends Selwyn and Tallulah when Uncle Fenwick, the friendly ghost, asks for his help in chasing a few relatives who've come to haunt him... Peewit has to get help from the Smurfs, and a merry chase begins...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Grouchy Makes A Splash: We all know Grouchy Smurf hates a lot of things. But one thing he hates more than anything else is water, when there is enough of it to drown in. You see, Grouchy can't swim. And when the Smurfs notice this peculiarity and try to teach him how to survive in water, the evil wizard Gargamel makes things a little more dangerous than they ought to be....

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - No Smurf Is An Island: Handy Smurf is the one who fixes everything that needs mending in the Village of the Smurfs. But are his efforts really appreciated by the other Smurfs? Not at all. At least this is what Handy feels when he resolves to leave the Smurfs Village forever and live in the sea with Marina the Mermaid...

programme.title: The Rabbids are in love.
programme.desc: A rabbid falls in love with the Teleporta-TV, enticed by the machine's incredible capacities.

programme.title: The Rabbids are scared!
programme.desc: The Rabbids are dying of thirst in the desert and take off on a quest to find a can of a refreshing beverage.

programme.title: The Rabbids are fearful.
programme.desc: The rabbids have discovered that they can make a rocket take off by burping!

programme.title: The Rabbids are causing a stir
programme.desc: Two Rabbids fall asleep on an abandoned couch.

programme.title: The Rabbids turn the city upside down.
programme.desc: The Rabbids get their hands on a remote-controlled car, and figure out how to use the controller.

programme.title: The Rabbids aim for the moon!
programme.desc: The only way for rabbids to get into their rocket to reach the moon is to go on a drastic diet!

programme.title: The Rabbids are crashing
programme.desc: A baby inadvertently gets swapped with a rabbid at the babysitter's expense.

programme.title: The Rabbids go to the Moon.
programme.desc: To fight against boredom, the rabbids launch a competition of strange noises.

programme.title: The Rabbids have a great plan.
programme.desc: Four rabbids find a wooden horse and tries to make it move by all means, while drawing Zak's attention.

programme.title: The Rabbids are fed up!
programme.desc: Amazed by a dog scratching himself, the Rabbids approach him, and get the dog's fleas.

programme.title: The Rabbids are doing something stupid.
programme.desc: A Rabbid walks down the street when he steps on some chewing gum.

programme.title: The Rabbids land at the North Pole.
programme.desc: Taking pity on a pack of frozen fish, the rabbids decide to set it free and embark on a risky mission.

programme.title: The Rabbids are in love.
programme.desc: A rabbid falls in love with the Teleporta-TV, enticed by the machine's incredible capacities.

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: Gnasher and Gnipper enter a dog show, regardless of Walter saying they don't have true talent. He wants Athena and Miss Mini Wuff to win, but Walter has just underestimated Gnasher's true capabilities. Followed by Grounded.

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: Athena gets Gnasher envy when seeing a pampered version of Gnasher in a magazine and when she hears that Dennis owns an Abyssinian wire-haired tripe hound (Gnasher), she wants him. However, being an owner to Gnasher isn't all cracked up to be! Followed by 'Splash'

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: Dennis gets a case of the hiccups from Mr. Har Har's can-o-giggles and is looking for a way to cure them ready for a film premier. Followed by Athena's Party

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: The garden is accidentaly wrecked when Dennis tries to give Gnasher a bath, so the gang have to fix the mess before Mum comes home. Followed by 'Run Rabbit Run'

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: Dennis makes a line of practical jokes for Mr. Scrimp, called 'The Menace Collection.' However, Dennis soon learns that it will put Mr. Har Har out of business.

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: After Walter takes up origami as a martial art, Dennis scoffs and comes up with his own martial art, and so the two prepare to battle it out. Followed by 'Smelling of Roses'

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: After watching a film about an alien invasion, Dennis, Curly and Pie Face decide to make their own film. However, Walter stumbles across them filming, and he only sees the action, not the camera. Filming what he sees on his mobile phone, he runs to tell the whole of Beanotown about the alien invasion. As panic spreads, Dennis and his friends discover the chaos and decide to keep filming in order to help make the best of their own alien film. Meanwhile, Sergeant Slipper investigates the alien landing that Walter has seen, and discovers the truth—that the spaceship is a playhouse with glow sticks in it. Followed by 'Castle in the Air'

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: Dennis and his pet dog, Gnasher, live by just one rule: Kids should make all the rules! Followed by Dance of the Seven Pies.

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: To get his friends back from Walter's group, Dennis challenges Walter to a videogames battle. Followed by 'Fish Tale'.

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: For a school project, Dennis and Walter both build robots. However, during an accident, both robots merge, causing Dennis and Walter to defend the school. Followed by 'No Joke.'

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: With one backstage pass for a Ratbucket gig, Dennis and his friends pass themselves off as Ratbucket, only for the real Ratbucket not to be able to play at his own concert. Followed by 60 second Dennis and 'Bad Dad'

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: After Dennis breaks his bike, Dad is unable to afford a new one, so Dennis convinces him to ask his boss for a raise. Unfortunately, Mr Scrimp reduces his wages instead. Dennis then trashes his house to convince Scrimp that his family are poor, so that Mr Scrimp will feel compelled to raise Dad's wages. Just as Scrimp has been taken in by Dennis' plan, Mum and Dad arrive home laden with shopping bags, resulting in Dad getting fired on the spot. Dennis resolves to get Dad his old job back by secretly causing chaos at his office. To restore order Scrimp rehires Dad, sealing the deal with a generous pay rise. Mum and Dad repair the house, but still don't have enough money to buy Dennis a new bike, instead it gets repaired with Dad's office rubber bands and paperclips. Followed by 60 Second Dennis and 'Dennis Hiccups'.

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: Believing Gnasher and Gnipper to be trapped in Beanotown Dog Pound, Dennis comes up with a plan to rescue his friends and bring them both home. Followed by more Dennis and Gnasher episodes.

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: When Dennis breaks his skateboard again, Dad agrees to buy Dennis the best skateboard there is as a replacement if he is able to win a prize at the upcoming school award ceremony. Followed by 60 Second Dennis and 'Dance of the Seven Pies'

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: Mum has bought curtain material for the soon to be newly decorated kitchen, and asks Dad to look after it while she is out. However, Dad falls asleep and mistakenly agrees that Dennis can use it as a giant sail. When Dad realises that it has gone, he calls Dennis to bring it back, but unfortunately Dennis gets into a spot of bother with the colonel, who takes the curtain material off Dennis. In an attempt to steal it back, the garden being wrecked and the kitchen is left looking like a bombsite. Dennis, Gnasher and Dad have to clean up the whole kitchen and redecorate it in time for Mum returning. When Mum decides it is time to hang the new curtains, Dennis is about to get the curtain material, but Mum reveals that she has changed her mind and bought new curtains instead. Followed by 'Fangs for the Memories'

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: Dennis, his friends and Walter's friends get marooned on a desert island when Dennis attempts to escape a boring field trip. Followed by Substitute Creecher

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: Dennis plays a prank on the citizens of Beanotown, causing them to evacuate, which causes trouble for Dennis later. Followed by 'No Place Like Home'

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: Gnasher and Gnipper enter a dog show, regardless of Walter saying they don't have true talent. He wants Athena and Miss Mini Wuff to win, but Walter has just underestimated Gnasher's true capabilities. Followed by Grounded.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: Sonic saves a damsel in distress, and falls in love with her, not knowing she's a robot built by Robotnik. But when she has a chance to trap him, she helps him escape, realizing she has fallen for him.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: When Scratch and Grounder use Robotnik's new Slo-Mo Ray Gun to capture Sonic, Tails rescues him by reversing the gun and turning it on a tribe of friendly Tree Sloth People who become a high speed commando strike force against Robotnik.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: Tails and other Mobius citizens are lured into Robotnik's robotic games of chance, and when they lose they're sent to slave labor camps. Sonic rescues Tails and the others by beating the house in games of chance at Robotnik's Casino.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: During a mission to one of Robotnik's factories, Sally is taken prisoner by Robotnik and Snively, who construct a roboti-sized "Sally" clone, complete with Sally's personality, and mannerisms. The double tricks Sonic into rescuing "Sally".

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: When a blizzard hits Knothole causing Dulcy to demolish a few huts during a landing, Sonic is forced to bunk with Antoine. // During a rainstorm, Rotor is putting the finishing touches on his new female robot assistant, named Ro-Becca.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: When Sally uncovers Robotnik's plan to seed the cloud with toxic rain, they attempt a daring mission to sabotage the dirigible-like craft being transported by land vehicles. Mission fails when Sally, Bunnie and Antoine are captured.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Sonic reluctantly takes Tails with him to the Big City to find some cotter pins for the Freedom Fighters catapults. While in the City, Sonic is nearly eaten alive by his old dog Muttski, now a roboti-sized guard dog in the Junk Heaps

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: The Freedom Fighters, with new addition, Dulcy, develop a De-Roboti-sizer and try it out on Bunnie. It's a success and, against Sally's wishes, Sonic battles Robotnik's newest weapon, a Virtual Reality Shriek-Bot.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: After Antoine saves Sally's life during a raid, Sonic can't stand his bragging and zips in to see Uncle Chuck, who finds out his "bug" in Robotnik's HQ is malfunctioning.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Sonic conquers Robotnik's latest evil - a vehicle designated to locate and destroy living tissue matter - during a solo mission to the Badlands. Upon Sonic's return, the Freedom Fighters honor him with a victory party.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.sub-title: Blast to the Past Part I
programme.desc: Sonic attempts a solo rescue to prevent prisoners from being roboti-sized and is hit by a Memory Scrambler that erases short-term memory.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: A homecoming is interrupted for Sonic, Sonia and Manic when Sleet and Dingo arrive to collect back taxes after returning to their birthplace.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: While lost in the wastelands of Mobius, Sonic, Manic and Sonia stumble upon an oasis called Lake Valley Resort.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: On a trip to Port Mobius, Sonic, Manic and Sonia are told that ships are sinking due to the Mobian sea-beast.

programme.title: Donkey Kong Country Kong for a Day
programme.desc: When King K. Rool and his cronies framed Donkey Kong for wrongdoing with his friends, it works even better than they expected Cranky banishes Donkey Kong to the White Mountains and Diddy replaces him to become the future ruler.

programme.title: SONIC X How to Catch a Hedgehog
programme.desc: After an encounter with Dr. Eggman, Sonic finds himself unable to stop running. Chris and his grandfather Chuck soon discover that Eggman's E-88 is behind Sonic's problem.

programme.desc: Kidaverse Roblox Rumble - Season 3

programme.title: Roblox Rumble Roblox Rumble

programme.title: Donkey Kong Country Raiders of the Lost Banana
programme.desc: Donkey Kong finds a golden banana inside Inka Dinka Doo's temple and gives it to Candy, but the banana contains a curse that causes havoc for whosoever keeps it and brings bad luck to the island.

programme.title: SONIC X A Dastardly Deed
programme.desc: Chris finds himself depressed at the prospect of his friends returning to their home world despite knowing that it is what's best for them. Meanwhile, Knuckles attempts to orchestrate a truce between Sonic and Eggman so that they can all return home.

programme.title: Roblox Rumble Roblox Rumble
programme.desc: Kidaverse Roblox Rumble - Season 3

programme.desc: Kidaverse Roblox Rumble - Season 3

programme.title: Donkey Kong Country From Zero to Hero
programme.desc: After Cranky's exam, Bluster believes he is going to die soon, so he tries to act nicely in order to be remembered well.

programme.title: SONIC X Countdown to Chaos
programme.desc: Eggman takes Chris hostage after tricking Knuckles and Chris into giving him all six Chaos Emeralds discovered. Eggman and Sonic face off once more as Sonic seeks to save Chris and prevent Eggman from obtaining the final Emerald.

programme.title: Roblox Rumble Roblox Rumble
programme.desc: Kidaverse Roblox Rumble - Season 3

programme.title: Roblox Rumble Roblox Rumble
programme.desc: Kidaverse Roblox Rumble - Season 3

programme.title: Donkey Kong Country Buried Treasure
programme.desc: Donkey Kong, Diddy and Funky find a map and soon, everyone wants to get the implied treasure. They all go on a treasure hunt and fight to get it.

programme.title: SONIC X Chaos Control Freaks
programme.desc: While trying to retrieve the 7th Chaos Emerald from Dr. Eggman, Sonic and Friends are transported to the human world where Sonic is rescued by a boy named Chris.

programme.title: Roblox Rumble Roblox Rumble
programme.desc: Kidaverse Roblox Rumble - Season 3

programme.title: Roblox Rumble Roblox Rumble
programme.desc: Kidaverse Roblox Rumble - Season 3

programme.title: Donkey Kong Country Cranky's Tickle Tonic
programme.desc: Cranky tries to stop Eddie the Mean Old Yeti's constant noisy groaning. Meanwhile, Donkey Kong and Diddy follow the runaway Crystal Coconut, that floated out of Cranky's house due to a magic spell.

programme.title: Populaire
programme.desc: Set in 1950s France, POPULAIRE is the extraordinary tale of Rose, a shopkeeper's daughter who dreams of escaping the trappings of her small village and a lifetime of drudgery as a housewife.

programme.title: Uptown Girls
programme.desc: Ray is a fussy nine-year-old girl whose last nanny just ran out. When Ray's way-too-busy mom hires Molly to be Ray's new nanny, it's the perfect setup for both girls to change their ways and discover that sometimes your best friend can come in the form that you least expect!

programme.title: I Want You Back
programme.desc: Peter and Emma thought they were on the precipice of life's biggest moments – marriage, kids, and houses in the suburbs – until their respective partners dumped them.

programme.title: Chef
programme.desc: When Chef Carl Casper suddenly quits his job at a prominent Los Angeles restaurant, he is left to figure out what's next. Finding himself in Miami, he teams up with his ex-wife, his friend and his son to launch a food truck.

programme.title: The Duke
programme.desc: When the faithful canine companion to the Duke of Dingwall, Hubert, inherits the Duke's estate, he teams up with the Butler's niece to fend off some greedy family members.

programme.title: Dogtanian and the Three Muskehounds
programme.desc: Dogtanian is an ambitious young swordsman who dreams of becoming a hero and joining the legendary Muskehounds. After proving his skills and earning their trust, he and the three Muskehounds must defend the King from the villainous Cardinal Richelieu's secret plot to seize power.

programme.title: MVP: Most Valuable Primate
programme.desc: Jack, a chimpanzee who recently escaped from an experimental lab, finds his way onto the ice at a junior hockey practice. Steven and his teammates realize the chimp has a natural talent for the game and he officially joins the team. As they win game after game, Jack becomes a minor celebrity.

programme.title: Air Bud: World Pup
programme.desc: Pup Star is back, and bigger than ever as the hit singing pup competition goes global! After achieving international stardom, Tiny the adorable Yorkie joins the inaugural Pup Star World Tour as a celebrity judge.

programme.title: Barbie: Dreamtopia
programme.desc: Barbie's youngest sister Chelsea is entered into a local bike race by her friend, she is embarrassed about not being able to ride without training wheels. Inspired by Barbie's stories, Chelsea finds herself transported to the magical world of Dreamtopia, where her imagination runs wild.

programme.title: Stonados
programme.desc: (2013) Schlocky disaster flick starring Paul Johansson. When tornadoes start tossing boulders at Boston, a storm chaser must stop the ensuing chaos using his untested theory on weather manipulation.

programme.title: Settlers
programme.desc: (2021) Gritty sci-fi thriller starring Sofia Boutella. On a remote Martian outpost, a family's fragile peace is shattered when a violent outsider arrives. Also starring Jonny Lee Miller.

programme.title: Predestination
programme.desc: (2015) Sci-fi action with Ethan Hawke and Succession's Sarah Snook. A temporal agent who stops crimes before they happen is tasked with catching a fugitive who's always one step ahead in time.

programme.title: Firequake
programme.desc: (2014) Sci-fi action with Alexandra Paul, Zoe Barker and Nigel Barber. When a new, highly explosive energy source seeps into the Earth's crust, can its creator save humanity from being extinguished?

programme.title: Deadly Voltage
programme.desc: (2015) Sci-Fi action with Mike Dopud. A fractured family is caught up in a lethal lightning storm. Amidst the terror and destruction, can they find a way to unite and survive?

programme.title: Fame
programme.desc: In this soaring and inspiring reinvention of the Oscar®-Winning hit film Fame (1980), a group of highly gifted dancers,singers, musicians and actors at the New York City High School of Performing Arts strive to live out their dreams and shine!

programme.title: Yours, Mine & Ours
programme.desc: Dennis Quaid and Rene Russo star in this delightful remake of the 1968 film of the same name. A widowed Coast Guard Admiral and a widowed handbag designer fall in love and marry, much to the dismay of her 10 and his 8 children.

programme.title: The People We Hate at the Wedding
programme.desc: Dysfunctional American siblings Alice and Paul -- along with their ever-optimistic mom-- are invited to the British wedding of their estranged half-sister, Eloise, as a chance for them to reconnect as – more or less – adults, and learn to love each other like they once did.

programme.title: Escape Plan 2
programme.desc: Years after Ray Breslin fought his way out of the escape-proof prison called "The Tomb," he's organized a new top-notch, for-hire security force. But when one of his team members goes missing he must now decipher a way to break into the world's best hidden prison...

programme.title: Escape Plan
programme.desc: When a structural-security authority finds himself incarcerated in a prison he designed, he has to put his skills to escape and find out who framed him.

programme.title: Dragon Warriors
programme.desc: Dragons, warriors, orcs, bounty hunters, goblins, wizards, elves, witches, maidens in distress, beautiful princesses, romance, true love, betrayal and magic come together when an unlikely group of heroes embark on a quest to save the land from an evil wizard who has sent a fire-breathing dragon to kill everyone in his realm who has fallen in love.

programme.title: Once Upon A Time In America
programme.desc: A former Prohibition-era Jewish gangster returns to the Lower East Side of Manhattan 35 years later, where he must once again confront the ghosts and regrets of his old life.

programme.title: In Time
programme.desc: Justin Timberlake and Amanda Seyfried co-star in this sci-fi thriller set in a future world where aging stops at 25, and the only way for one man to stay alive is to steal more time.

programme.title: Labyrinth
programme.desc: Sixteen-year-old Sarah must solve a labyrinth to rescue her baby brother when he is taken by the Goblin King.

programme.title: The Ninth Gate
programme.desc: A rare book dealer, while seeking out the last two copies of a demon text, gets drawn into a conspiracy with supernatural overtones. Starring: Johnny Depp, Frank Langella, Lena Olin

programme.title: The Last Witch Hunter
programme.desc: The last witch hunter (Vin Diesel) is all that stands between humanity and the combined forces of the most horrifying witches in history.

programme.title: Hellboy
programme.desc: Caught between the worlds of the supernatural and human, Hellboy battles an ancient sorceress bent on revenge.

programme.title: Power Rangers
programme.desc: Five teenagers, infused with superhuman abilities, must harness their newfound powers to battle alien invaders

programme.title: Push
programme.desc: Two kids with special abilities must find a girl in Hong Kong before a shadowy government organization does.

programme.title: Henry V
programme.desc: King Henry V of England is insulted by the King of France. As a result, he leads his army into battle against France. Along the way, the young king must struggle with the sinking morale of his troops and his own inner doubts. The war culminates at the bloody Battle of Agincourt.

programme.title: Acts of Vengeance
programme.desc: A fast-talking lawyer transforms his body and takes a vow of silence, not to be broken until he finds out who killed his wife and daughter and has his revenge.

programme.title: Adventures of a Taxi Driver
programme.desc: Joe likes the ladies and gets to meet a variety of them in his job as a taxi driver. From dizzy young women to frustrated housewives, Joe fancies them all, and they take a fancy to Joe. If only things were smoother at home for the put-upon cabbie. With his nagging mother, thieving teenage brother, and the attentions of an overbearing girlfriend with ideas of marriage, Joe leaves the homestead and rents the spare room at his best mate's flat. Meanwhile, he continues to find himself in an assortment of humorous sexual escapades until he accidentally becomes embroiled in a jewel heist that doesn't quite go to plan.

programme.title: Adventures of a Plumber's Mate
programme.desc: Times are hard for plumber Sid South. Up to his neck in bills, facing eviction from his home and in debt to a violent bookie, he desperately needs to raise some funds or else Sid will be a broken man - literally, as there are two thugs ready to break every bone in his body unless he hands over the cash he owes their boss. It doesn't help that Sid never seems to get paid for any of the work he does, as his occupation lands him in a variety of risqu situations which always end in disaster. Drastic times call for drastic measures, and the browbeaten plumber seeks employment from Dodger, a shady wheeler-dealer who can put some dubious work Sid's way. But, as always, things never seem to go exactly to plan and the beguiled plumber finds himself in further strife.

programme.title: Vanquish
programme.desc: Morgan Freeman and Ruby Rose lead in this non-stop actioner from the director of Bad Boys. A retired, crooked police commissioner - Damon Hickley blackmails his caretaker - Victoria by kidnapping her daughter and forces her to help him double cross his former team of dirty cops. Victoria is forced to fight her way through drug dealers and underworld thugs in a bid to save her child.

programme.title: Pimped
programme.desc: Over the course of one night, Sarah meets the handsome, captivating and smooth talking Lewis, who aims to be the bait in a sick sexual trap set up by himself and his low-life, rich kid housemate Kenneth. When their ruse backfires, Lewis and Sarah are forced into an unlikely alliance with deadly consequences.

programme.title: Romulus v. Remus: The First King
programme.desc: Vikings meets Game of Thrones meets Apocolypto, this historical action epic is the legendary story of two brothers who battled to found the greatest empire history has ever known Rome. With stunning visuals and immersive epic battle scenes, follow Romulus and Remus as they escape captivity, battle sacred fire and violent warriors, leading one of them seal his fate as the chosen one.

programme.title: Level 16
programme.desc: A shocking dystopian thriller, mashing together the disturbing world of The Handmaid's Tale and Black Mirror to stunning effect. 16-year old Vivien is trapped in The Vestalis Academy, a prison-like boarding school. Reunited with Sophia who previously betrayed her, they embark on the horrifying truth behind their imprisonment. Soon running for their lives, they must save themselves or die.

programme.title: Lead With Your Heart
programme.desc: (2015) Drama starring William Baldwin. When their parents' marriage hits the rocks, two teenagers team up to hatch a daring plan to keep the family together.

programme.title: Cupids on Beacon Street
programme.desc: (2021) Romance with Britt Irvin. Opposites attract as an unromantic copy editor house sits with a handsome self-help coach running romantically themed workshops.

programme.title: One Of A Kind Love
programme.desc: (2020) Rom-com with Jocelyn Hudon and Jake Manley. Aspiring jeweller Kyra dreams big, but will a clash with business tycoon Aidan tarnish her sparkle-or ignite something magical?

programme.title: Love Birds
programme.desc: (2011) Romcom starring Rhys Darby and Sally Hawkins. The path to love is not proving easy for the recently heartbroken Doug, but maybe all he needs is a little duck...

programme.title: The Wedding Arrangements
programme.desc: When talented botanist Violet needs help preparing flower arrangements for a high-profile wedding, she calls upon Jack, a handsome nature photographer who has taken over responsibility for his grandfather's flower shed.

programme.title: In from the Side
programme.desc: In from the Side' is the story of an adulterous affair between two members of a fictional South London gay rugby club. The film explores the multiple types of connections that can occur within a large group of gay men in a team sports environment…

programme.title: Love, Rosie
programme.desc: Rosie and Alex have been best friends since age six. As they dream of travelling the world, they decide to leave their small British town for Boston together to attend university. But fate has other plans...

programme.title: Smart People
programme.desc: A widowed professor (Dennis Quaid) experiences a new love and an unexpected visit from his adopted brother.

programme.title: The Loss Adjuster
programme.desc: Hapless Insurance Loss Adjuster - Martin Dyer - feels his life is spiralling out of control but discovers that even when you reach rock bottom, that some clouds really do have a silver lining.

programme.title: Forever In My Heart
programme.desc: Jenna and Charlie found love in Ireland but their dreams drove them apart. Five years later, they reunite and Jenna has to decide where her heart belongs—back home or in the Emerald Isle.

programme.title: Christmas on Mistletoe Lake
programme.desc: Reilly finds herself in the magical town of Mistletoe Lake. She accepts the offer of Ray to stay in his boat, helping him renovate for the town's Christmas Harbor Festival. Reilly embarks on a journey to save the towns she fell in love with.

programme.title: Dancing Through Christmas
programme.desc: OLIVIA is picked to run the Christmas recital of The Nutcracker. When a video of Michael practising ballet with Lily goes viral, Olivia sees how much dance really means to the community. Will Olivia be able to save her dance studio with Michael's help?

programme.title: A Warm December
programme.desc: An African-American doctor falls in love with the niece of an African ambassador during his vacation in London, but it turns out that she is suffering from a rare terminal illness.

programme.title: Passport to Love
programme.desc: Nicole, a successful travel blogger, meets Kade, a marketing rep for a travel publishing company, and they form the beginnings of a relationship while exploring an island destination. They juggle their work traveling around the world while seeing each other again. Both know there's something special between them, but it will be put to the test when Kade's competitive boss challenges Kade to thwart Nicole's business.

programme.title: Love In Aruba
programme.desc: A lonely teacher (Amber) is hired by Connor, the single father of a struggling student. She is to tutor his daughter Macey (age 10) over a summer while they travel for his work. As Amber helps Macey, she sees glimpses of what's missing in the family's life. Their grand destinations are filled with rich items and potential rewarding business deals, but it's missing heart. Amber's influence fills the void and brings Macey and Connor together. With it, Amber starts to fall in love with Connor, but can he see her as anything beyond the hired help?

programme.title: The Confession
programme.desc: All her life, Katie Lapp (Katie LeClerc) has known no other world than that of the Amish family who raised her. But upon discovering that she was actually adopted from out of the "English" world, her quest for answers to her identity resulted in her being shunned by her people. Now in "The Confession," the thrilling sequel to "The Shunning," Katie is on an even greater quest--to be reunited before it is too late with her long-lost birth mother, Laura Mayfield (Sherry Stringfield), who is dying of cancer. Only the challenges of being Amish in an English world stand in her way... along with one man who has other plans for her biological mother's legacy.

programme.title: The Beautiful Beast
programme.desc: The classic Beauty and the Beast tale told with a twist! Isabelle is all beauty - on the outside. When she gets lost on a skiing vacation, she is helped by Jeremy, a man hiding from the world and his past. He's the first person to put Isabelle in her place, and Isabelle realizes she might be more beast than she wants to admit. Through Jeremy's influence she begins to change - and fall in love.

programme.title: Psycho BFF
programme.desc: Renee forbids her daughter's relationship with a friend from continuing.

programme.title: My Daughter's Psycho Friend
programme.desc: At her new school, Sierra encounters the devious Lexi and her posse of friends.

programme.title: Man Struggles to Save His Family From Drowning
programme.desc: A heart-wrenching drama unfolds when a man struggles to save his family.

programme.title: Psycho Intern
programme.desc: A startup hires a male intern who has a one-night stand with a female manager.

programme.title: Psycho BFF
programme.desc: Renee forbids her daughter's relationship with a friend from continuing.

programme.title: Baby Bootcamp
programme.desc: Fitness instructor Julia is down on her luck, trying to make her baby boot camp a thriving business. To make ends meet, she becomes a part-time nanny for a single widowed father. Trouble is, she knows nothing about taking care of children.

programme.title: Made For You, With Love
programme.desc: A secondhand wedding dress owner helps brides find their dream gowns but fears giving love a second chance.

programme.title: Groomzilla
programme.desc: A newly engaged woman makes a wish that her fiancee take the planning of their wedding seriously, and to her surprise and dismay, her wish comes true.

programme.title: Dying for a Baby
programme.desc: A couple is threatened when Jessica, the driver from their past accident, moves in next door seeking revenge.

programme.title: The Karate Kid: Part II
programme.desc: This sequel to the box office smash THE KARATE KID, takes the original cast Ralph Macchio and Pat Morita to Japan, where they face new and ancient rivals. Directed by John G. Avildsen, who also directed ROCKY and the original KARATE KID.

programme.title: Almost Famous
programme.desc: Rolling Stone Magazine unwittingly hires a 15 year old aspiring journalist after reading an article he wrote for Cream Magazine. ALMOST FAMOUS is the hilarious and touching story of this intelligent young man's journey into the world of Rock-and-Roll as he tours with "Stillwater", an up-and-coming band struggling with their rise to fame.

programme.title: 30 Minutes Or Less
programme.desc: The tale of three slacker friends and the adventures that ensure after one of them inadvertently robs a bank armed only with a large salami.

programme.title: It Could Happen To You
programme.desc: Much to the horror of his upwardly mobile wife, a New York City cop makes good on his promise to split his lottery winnings with a waitress in this delightful comedy. Money changes everything, and all three lives are transformed in this charming comedy.

programme.title: Halleluja and Sartana Strike Again
programme.desc: Two charming conmen—one posing as a missionary—set out to swindle a church group but end up clashing with a gang of greedy landgrabbers. In this slapstick western, the schemers unexpectedly turn into heroes as they help protect the townsfolk from losing everything.

programme.title: Four Fast Guns
programme.desc: A gunslinger rides into Purgatory, claiming to be the town tamer they hired—though he killed the real one. For $500, payable to a widow of his victim, he takes on the town's wheelchair-bound crime boss. The outlaw fights to free the town while facing three hired killers sent to eliminate him, testing his resolve and his skill as lawman-for-hire.

programme.title: My Outlaw Brother
programme.desc: A young man travels to Mexico in search of his brother, who has become involved with a dangerous gang.

programme.title: Sitting Bull
programme.desc: A cavalry officer sympathetic to the wronged Sioux fixes a meeting between Chief Sitting Bull and President Grant but a dishonest Indian Agent and a hateful General Custer test the Sioux's patience, threatening to derail the peace-talks.

programme.title: Arizona Colt Returns
programme.desc: Famed gunman Arizona Colt is sent by Moreno to rescue his daughter from the grips of Arizona's old enemy, Keane. But certain complications make the mission far more dangerous than expected.

programme.title: Birthday Present
programme.desc: When Simon Scott's attempt to smuggle a watch through customs for his wife's birthday present is discovered he is charged by the police and, due to a bungling defense by his solicitor, obliged to serve a prison sentence. His employer, Colonel Wilson, is sympathetic, but has to sack him and Simon discovers that finding another job is extremely difficult. But Colonel Wilson is determined to help him and eventually a solution is reached.

programme.title: Went the Day Well?
programme.desc: Bramley End, snug and safe, seemed far away from the events of World War II. Little did the villagers suspect the grim events which were impending.

programme.title: Carve Her Name with Pride
programme.desc: During World War II, Violette Szabo volunteers to be parachuted into France as a secret agent to aid a Resistance group. Ultimately captured by the Germans, she refuses to betray her comrades and must suffer the consequences.

programme.title: A Challenge for Robin Hood
programme.desc: The film recounting the oft-told tale of Robin and his merry band of outsiders. The notable difference is a concentration on Robin's hated cousin Roger instead of the usual Robin-sheriff rift.After being falsely accused of murder, Sir Robin of Loxley takes refuge in the untamed wilderness of Sherwood Forest where he stumbles across a group of outlaws. Although initially suspicious of the aristocrat's motives, the men are soon won over by his integrity and prowess and Robin transforms them into a formidable fighting force, stealing from the rich and giving to the poor. As word of his fame and valour spreads, a legend is born...

programme.title: Dangerous Exile
programme.desc: The young Dauphin of France takes refuge in a Welsh town during the French Revolution.

programme.title: Evil Empire: Friday the 13th Chapter 2
programme.desc: GenreAt the same time, in a hospital in Pyongyang, North Korea, a female doctor discovers a phenomenon where the cells of the deceased are being revived. However, she is forced to flee to South Korea due to the authorities' pursuit. A series of serial killings known as the "Suicide Syndrome" continue to occur simultaneously, and the whereabouts of both Phillip and Cheong-ha, who were investigating the case, remain mysterious. Meanwhile, the young police officer Jae-hyeok, who provided crucial clues to Cheong-ha in her time of crisis, finds himself relentlessly pursued by killers dispatched from Japan and the United States. Despite relying on information from an anonymous woman who calls him unilaterally, Jae-hyeok unwittingly gets drawn closer to the center of the case as the situation progresses. What is the key to the case that Jae-hyeok holds? Why are ruthless killers from the United States pursuing him? Why is the foreign police from Japan investigating the "Suicide Syndrome" in Korea? And why is North Korea trying to conceal the truth about a secret project from the Japanese military?

programme.title: Just for you
programme.desc: A road movie about young people who heal their wounds from love through busking in the streets of Vietnam.

programme.title: Last Film
programme.desc: At a provincial university's film and theater department, Park Sang-min, who teaches film, is also a film director. In the midst of this crisis, loan shark Man-bok approaches Sang-min and proposes a deal: if Sang-min makes a film about Man-bok's life, Man-bok will help him pay off his debt. Sang-min accepts the offer, and as they work Sang-min accumulated a significant amount of debt while making movies, eventually coming under threat from loan sharks. Afterward, "Sang-min" embarks on a journey with "Man-bok," experiencing events that blur the lines between dream and reality. The ultimate film they always wanted to create becomes their last reel.

programme.title: Little Brother
programme.desc: A warming and touching drama about a 9-year-old troublemaker who suddenly starts behaving himself believing that being good can save his ill brother.

programme.title: Unframed
programme.desc: An omnibus film project, written and directed by four actors exploring new possibilities outside the frame, capturing moments of life, family and relationships.

programme.title: Proximity
programme.desc: Close Encounters of the Third Kind' meets 'Independence Day'. Earth is in danger and a loner named Isaac holds the key to unravelling the mystery that will expose the truth behind alien abduction.

programme.title: The Day Time Ended
programme.desc: A futuristic solar home in the far desert was supposed to be their refuge from urban crime. To their horror, the family discovers they're caught in a mind-boggling time warp caused by mysterious aliens with a sinister secret.

programme.title: Parallel
programme.desc: A group of friends stumble upon a mirror that serves as a portal to a "multiverse", but soon discover that importing knowledge from the other side in order to better their lives brings increasingly dangerous consequences.

programme.title: Bleeding Steel
programme.desc: Special Forces agent Lin Dong (Jackie Chan) becomes embroiled in a high-tech conspiracy as he attempts to protect a crucial witness. Just as he gets closer to discovering the truth, Lin Dong is lucky to escape with his life when he is pursued by a mysterious and heavily-armed militia.

programme.title: Origin Wars
programme.desc: CONTAINS FLASHING IMAGES: Set in the future in a time of interplanetary colonisation, Sy (Kellan Lutz), a mysterious drifter, meets Kane (Daniel MacPherson), a lieutenant working for an off-world military contractor – EXOR.

programme.title: Crashing Through the Snow
programme.desc: (2021) Festive fun with Amy Acker. After teaming up to outshine his sister's perfect Christmas, a man and his girlfriend are soon sledding into chaos when the family drama snowballs out of contr

programme.title: Foster
programme.desc: (2011) Drama with Toni Collette. The Morrisons, unable to have a child, have been struggling to adopt. When a seven-year-old boy shows up on their doorstep, their lives are turned upside down.

programme.title: A Date By Christmas
programme.desc: (2019) Christmas romance with Vanessa Lengies. When the dating app she created grants her magical powers, can Chelsea use her abilities to help the 'naughty' people in her life onto the nice list?

programme.title: Christmas in the Air
programme.desc: Robert, a widower and father of two children, enlists Lydia to help him juggle his chaotic work-life balance at Christmastime. Will their close relationship lead to love? Stars Catherine Bell. (2017)

programme.title: Relic Hunter
programme.desc: Tia Carrere ('Wayne's World') stars as Sydney Fox, a university professor and black belt who globe-trots after lost, stolen and rumored-to-exist artifacts and antiquities.

programme.title: Relic Hunter
programme.desc: Tia Carrere ('Wayne's World') stars as Sydney Fox, a university professor and black belt who globe-trots after lost, stolen and rumored-to-exist artifacts and antiquities.

programme.title: Relic Hunter
programme.desc: Tia Carrere ('Wayne's World') stars as Sydney Fox, a university professor and black belt who globe-trots after lost, stolen and rumored-to-exist artifacts and antiquities.

programme.desc: Tia Carrere ('Wayne's World') stars as Sydney Fox, a university professor and black belt who globe-trots after lost, stolen and rumored-to-exist artifacts and antiquities.

programme.title: The Water Margin
programme.sub-title: Mourn the Slaughter of so Many
programme.desc: Nearly a thousand years ago in ancient China, there was a cruel government. 108 renegade will try to change the story.

programme.sub-title: The War to End all Wars

programme.title: Silverado
programme.desc: Four drifters arrive in a small frontier town and become unlikely heroes in a battle against a powerful family and a corrupt sheriff.

programme.title: 3000 Miles To Graceland
programme.desc: Posing as Elvis impersonators, ex-convicts rob a Las Vegas casino during an Elvis Presley fan convention, but greed and dissention among them ultimately lead to betrayal and chaos.

programme.title: 3000 Miles To Graceland
programme.desc: Posing as Elvis impersonators, ex-convicts rob a Las Vegas casino during an Elvis Presley fan convention, but greed and dissention among them ultimately lead to betrayal and chaos.

programme.title: Life With Music
programme.desc: In this life affirming story of hope, struggling pianist (Stewart) finds inspiration with a free-spirited music critic (Holmes)

programme.title: Permanent Midnight
programme.desc: Based on an allegedly true story of TV writer Jerry Stahl with a $5000 a week job and a $6000 a week cocaine habit.

programme.title: Short Term 12
programme.desc: Short Term 12 is told through the eyes of Grace (Brie Larson), a twenty-something supervisor at a foster-care facility for at-risk teenagers. Passionate and tough, Grace is a formidable caretaker of the kids in her charge, and in love with her long-term boyfriend, Mason (John Gallagher Jr.).

programme.title: Escobar
programme.desc: Escobar chronicles the rise and fall of the worlds most feared drug lord Pablo Escobar and his volatile love affair with Colombia's most famous journalist Virginia Vallejo throughout a reign of terror that tore a country apart.

programme.title: Tracers
programme.desc: It's a race for survival in the criminal underworld of New York in the action-packed thriller TRACERS.

programme.title: Abduction
programme.desc: A thriller centered on a young man who sets out to uncover the truth about his life after finding his baby photo on a missing persons website.

Based on actual events - A group of 5 people find themselves trapped in an elevator in the World Trade Center's North Tower on 9/11. They work together, never giving up hope, to try to escape before the unthinkable happens.

programme.title: Righteous Kill
programme.desc: The story begins with highly decorated Detectives Turk and Rooster of the NYPD facing a retirement which neither of them are ready for. Before they can hang up their badges, they are called to investigate the murder of a notorious pimp, who appears to have ties to a case they solved years before.
